mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM slpboard JOIN slpmember USING (mem_num)
title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR nick_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR nick_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT board_num,
REPLACE(REPLACE(title,'<','<'),'>','>') title,
hit, reg_date, mem_num, id, nick_name FROM slpboard JOIN slpmember USING(mem_num)
title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR nick_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR nick_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY board_num DESC OFFSET #{skip} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM slpboard_reply JOIN slpmember USING (mem_num) WHERE board_num = #{board_num} ORDER BY re_num DESC OFFSET #{skip} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
